checklist.label: Read packet.inputEvidence.phase3.identityDecision before validation; declared fixtures must fail do-not-ship validation and cannot be sealed as a passed Phase 5 result.
Read packet.inputEvidence.phase4 artifactHash, routesGenerated, commandsRun, and buildResult before validation.
Use packet.inputEvidence.phase4 as the validation scope; audit the built output from Phase 4, not an unrelated site or stale preview.
Run factory validate and record command, exit code, checked gate ids, and log path.
Run /aaron-marketing:seo-geo --mode audit --full --tech --visibility and record the report path.
Separate blocking validation failures from non-blocking advisories before review.
Read the resolved specialist SKILL.md before authoring phase work.
Fill the scaffolded phase artifact with contract-compliant evidence.
Run inspect-artifact before complete-phase and fix reported weaknesses.
Require reviewer notes to travel by --notes-file.

identityDecision.rationale: AMENDED 2026-07-08: owner supplied real values (Netlify subdomain now; custom domain can follow), real GA4 property, and a live business inbox. Fixtures fully retired; factory validate exits 0. paymentAccepted still unknown -> omitted from JSON-LD.

filesChanged: src/pages/index.astro (HOME-FIRST upgrades: Gazette press-quote card w/ gold accent border, one-location truth strip, visit-links to open-late/catering/how-to-order; interior style language)
src/data/landings.json (10 -> 13: + open-late-cedar-rapids [intent], catering-cedar-rapids [intent], location [info]; faq landing + 2 disambiguation questions -> 11 FAQs)
src/data/site.json (footer + 3 inbound links for the new pages -> 17 footer links)
src/data/* otherwise carried from validated prior build (menu = owner paste exactly; sides delta held per open owner question)
src/graph/** carried (14 menu + 6 occasions + 6 facts KNOW nodes + 92 seeded Q&A; menu unchanged)
dist/ (38 routes + sitemap + robots.txt + graph-mode llms.txt 6.5KB / llms-full 19KB)
src/data/business.json + all seo.canonical fields (identity fixtures -> REAL values; 36 replacements)
commandsRun: local-site-workflow prepare --phase 4 (evidence-chained packet: phase2 + phase3, no missing evidence) -> prepared
home-first authoring (index.astro) + new landings + footer links -> done per owner directive
factory build -> success — 38 pages in ~2.6s, exit 0
route-vs-matrix verification -> built set == approved Phase 2 matrix: missing [], extra []
link + guardrail sweep -> 0 dangling internal links; 0 slashless hrefs; calamari absent; open-late <title> carries no hours claim
factory validate -> exit 1 — ONLY do-not-ship-guards on declared identity fixtures (intended); zero advisories
preview verification (home) -> press-quote + truth strip + new links render; video hero present; single h1; 0 broken images; 8 sections
identity swap (real domain/email/GA4) + factory build -> success 38 pages
factory validate (post-identity) -> EXIT 0: zero gates, zero advisories

validate.reason: identity real; do-not-ship-guards clean; all gates pass

stopCondition: Stop after producing exactly one inspected phase artifact; do not continue to the next phase in the same invocation.
